breaches.label: AMYY
breaches.source: 7,953 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 15,344 60d med = 4,603 sh cap) (173% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 560,001 out = 196,000 sh cap) (4% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~4,271 sh on AMYY to reach warn band (3,350 sh over median vol (30% × 15,344 60d med = 4,603 sh cap)).

breaches.label: BBYY
breaches.source: 3,900 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 1,411 60d med = 423 sh cap) (922% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 60,001 out = 21,000 sh cap) (19% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~3,561 sh on BBYY to reach warn band (3,477 sh over median vol (30% × 1,411 60d med = 423 sh cap)).

breaches.action: Cut ~24,287 sh on COYY to reach warn band (21,320 sh over median vol (30% × 49,457 60d med = 14,837 sh cap)).

breaches.label: FBYY

breaches.label: QBY

breaches.action: Cut ~3,634 sh on QBY to reach warn band (3,318 sh over median vol (30% × 5,270 60d med = 1,581 sh cap)).

breaches.label: RTYY

breaches.action: Cut ~1,080 sh on RTYY to reach warn band (600 sh over median vol (30% × 8,000 60d med = 2,400 sh cap)).

breaches.label: SMYY
breaches.source: 13,999 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 30,700 60d med = 9,210 sh cap) (152% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 1,220,001 out = 427,000 sh cap) (3% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~6,631 sh on SMYY to reach warn band (4,789 sh over median vol (30% × 30,700 60d med = 9,210 sh cap)).

breaches.label: XBTY
breaches.source: 11,755 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 44,500 60d med = 13,350 sh cap) (88% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 2,200,001 out = 770,000 sh cap) (2% of cap)
breaches.action: Trim ~1,075 sh on XBTY toward warn band (11,755 sh short vs 13,350 sh median vol (30% × 44,500 60d med = 13,350 sh cap)).

indices.description: T+0: instantaneous portfolio β×ΔSPX. 1M–12M: horizon-scaled equity shock (rms) + LETF decay/borrow. 12M-terminal row uses full labeled ΔSPX. Historical rows integrate piecewise SPX paths.

vix_decay_matrix.description: Expected net book carry over the next 12 months at SPX 0%, with forecast vol adjusted by vol elasticity (v3 log-log), variance decomposition, optional spike-revert path integral, and VIX-stressed borrow on short legs.

bucket_sleeve_panel.capital_reason: capital_snapshot missing from totals.json (run EOD after upgrade)
bucket_sleeve_panel.exposure_note: Exposure gross/net = delta-normalized (β × notional). Deployed capital = signed MV on etf_screened_today (screener universe). B3 is a flow overlay; B4 gross is ratio-split (pair-view in bucket detail).

borrow_shock_panel.note: Annualized carry = Σ |short notional| × borrow APR on held short ETFs. Shocks are applied to every leg's current APR; incremental = shocked − current.

shared_underlying_panel.note: Underlyings appearing in more than one accounting bucket share a single broker spot line that nets across sleeves; B4 attribution slices it.

winners.symbols: MSTR, MSTU, MSTW, MSTX, MSTY, MSTZ, MTYY
COIA, COIG, COIN, COIW, CONL, CONX, CONY, COYY

losers.symbols: MSFL, MSFO, MSFT, MSFU, MSFW, MSFX

movers_panel.note: Cumulative (YTD) PnL by underlying from pnl_by_underlying.csv.

display_sleeve_groups.label: Buckets 1, 2, 4, and 5
display_sleeve_groups.exposure_note: Share-notional book (B1+B2+B4 ratio split + B5 vol ETP); excludes B3 overlay.

display_sleeve_groups.label: Bucket 3
display_sleeve_groups.exposure_note: Delta-normalized flow hedge overlay (|β| × notional), not share gross.
